titleStmt.title: SII 9.172: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 172. (A.R. No. 505 of 1915.) ON A SLAB LYING IN KALKANTHARAYA TEMPLE AT KARAKANTHAPURA, A HAMLET OF PEDDATUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 31, Vyaya, Śrāvaṇa, puṇṇame, Budhavāra, Sōma-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1106, July 17 Tuesday (not wednesday) on which day there was a lunar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva. The Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Mallarasa, reputed for his bravery and conquests, is said to have made a gift of land for musical service, offerings, etc., of the god Kaṟekaṇṭhēśvara. The Mahājanas of the village Tumbuḷa also made some contribution out of the toll-revenue of the village for the service of the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śrī śrī śrī
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē ©
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmattribhuvanamalladē
vara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttami
re kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpā
dapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara vīramahēśvaraṁ
cōḷakaṭakakarituragapaṭusubhaṭanicayanicitabaḷavadaribaḷatimirakhaṇḍanapratā
pamārttaṇḍa nikararoḷgaṇḍa draviḷamaṇḍaḷikaśiraḥkhaṇḍana maṇḍaḷikamukhama
ṇḍananadaṭamaṁḍaḷikatārakāsurāri dasavandhamurāri mitramaṇḍaḷikaku
ḷārṇnavacaṁdra bhōgāmarēṁdra satyavikhyāta maṁḍaḷikamāndhātanāha
vanīṟa . sēneyaṁkakāṟa . pallikōṭagharaṭṭa gūrjjaradiśāpaṭṭa śrīmattri
bhuvanamalladēvara kaṭṭidalagu malevaranalagu nāmādisamastapra
śastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ mallarasar śrīmaccāḷukyavikra
mavarṣada 31 neya vyayasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa puṇname budha
vāradandu sōmagrahaṇamahāparvvadoḷ śrīkaṟekaṇṭhadēvara gītavādyanṛ
tyakkaṁ dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ siṁdavāḍināḍoḷagaṇā
davani 500 ṟaṟa kampaṇaṁ tuṁbaḷa 30ttaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ baḍagikūṁṭeya
manedeṟe holedeṟe sādaṁ baṇnige baḷaṁbeyateṟe taḷa sārige kāṇike kavaṇāya
daṇḍadāyavintinitumaṁ mattamalliya taḷavṛtti 40ttu mattarkkeyyuṁ dēvara
nivēdyakke hiriyakeṟeya keḷage 600 kamma gaḻdeyumaṁ mattamūriṁ
taṁkaṇa haḷḷada kālveyalli 3 mattaru gaḻdeyuma(ṁ)nābaḷiya bāḍaṁ cikkaba
navaseyumaṁ sarvvanamasyavāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭar © svadattāṁ parada
ttāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
muṭṭidalagahitara bennaṭṭidalagu jagadoḷuḷḷa kaṁṭakaraṁ kūrbaṭṭaḷamenisu
va cakriya kaṭṭidalagu mallibhūpanādidiḷīpa © besanaṁ śrīvikramāṁ
kaṁ besase pasadamendāntukoṇḍaṁ baḷikkā vesakaṁ kīḷāgadārāroḷavu kaḷaladārāra
(ḷavukaḷaladārāra) tējaprabhāvaprasaraṁ pindāgadārāradaṭu muṟiyadārāra
śauryyōdayaṁ nīrasamantēnāgadudyadripunṛpamadavicchēdanaṁ mallabhūpa .
mattaṁ mahāpaṭṭaṇaṁ tuṁbuḷamahānagaraṁ naḍesuva paḍi caitradalu
gadyāṇa 1 pavitradalu gadyāṇa 1 . mūlevattaṁ hēṟiṁge hiriyaso
ḷasa 2 soṁṭigeyakki mattaṁ taḷada baḷaṁjigaruṁ nānādēśigaḷumiḻdu koṭṭar
Arisinada hēṟu 1 rkke pala 5 śu(ṁ)ṇṭhiya hēṟiṁge pa 5 Aḍake hēṟiṁge 20
meḷasu hēṟiṁge hiriyasoḷasa 2 jīrage hēṟiṁge hiriya soḷasa 2
kaccaguḍakke hēṟinarddha bellaṁ bhaṇḍige 10 hēṟiṁge 2 hannavaṇadalli hēṟiṁ
ge yele 50 © mattaṁ nāḍa manneyaruṁ caudhoregaḷuṁ prabhu
gāvuṇḍagaḷumiḻdu koṭṭar grāmānugrāmadaluttamadalu
paṇa 3 madhyamadalu paṇa 2 kaniṣṭadalu paṇa 1 Intī dharmmamaṁ
candrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍeyisuvar © sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ
nṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāginaṟpā
rtthivēndrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacandraḥ © Ī dharmma
kanukūḷarādavargganantapuṇyaṁ pratikūḷarādavargge vāra
ṇāsiyoḷ sāsirvvabrāhmaṇarumaṁ sāsira kavile
yumanaḷida pātakavakku .
yāgatammaThis line is written in a different hand.
Digital edition of SII 9.172 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
